sentences.arabic: تُشَكِّلُ قَصِيدَةُ النَّثْرِ الْحَدِيثَةُ تَحَوُّلًا جَوْهَرِيًّا فِي مَسِيرَةِ الشِّعْرِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الَّذِي ظَلَّ لِقُرُونٍ وَفِيًّا لِأَوْزَانِ الْبَحْرِ الْخَلِيلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Moderna poema u prozi predstavlja suštinski preokret u historiji arapske poezije koja je vijekovima ostajala vjerna metrima Halifove prosodie.
sentences.translationEn: The modern prose poem represents a fundamental shift in the course of Arabic poetry, which for centuries remained faithful to the metres of Khalilian prosody.
